Dialog.name: MSG_1F_OverRap01_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}I wonder if Kirijo-senpai and the others are okay...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_2F_OverRap01_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1120 0 0}I-It won't come in through the window, right...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_3F_OverRap01_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1053 0 0}Sorry, I know this is sudden and you were sleeping... I promise I'll explain later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_2F_OverRap02_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Wait, are you trying to escape from the window...? You can't do that![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ROOM_STOP_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}That wouldn't work after all...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_VENDOR_STOP_3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}This isn't an evacuation drill, you know...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}If we don't get out of here, we're going to die![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_YUKARI_QUAKE_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}I-It doesn't seem like it's going to be over anytime soon...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Amada_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Staying in one room probably won't help. We need to go somewhere else...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Aragaki_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}Don't worry, there's no one left! Let's just get out of here![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Junpei_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}I'm not joking, we're in danger! We gotta hurry and run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Sanada_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}I wonder if the others are okay...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}No, I'm sure they'll do something about this. We need to focus on getting away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_MyRoom_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1103 0 0}We don't have time to go back! Let's go![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_2FJuice_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}That's not going to work right now. Please, can you leave that for later?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Mituru_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}I wonder what Kirijo-senpai and the others are gonna do...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Anyway, it's dangerous here too, so we need to hurry and run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Yukari_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}...Sorry, it's nothing. Let's hurry and keep going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_Aegis_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}No time to waste. We need to hurry and get somewhere safe...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_None_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1025 0 0}Don't worry. I'm sure everything will work out...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}C'mon, let's hurry and get away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_3FJuice_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}You can enjoy all the drinks you want later, so please... We have to go right now, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_NG2Fto1F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1064 0 0}Wait, it's dangerous that way! We need to head up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_RoomHit_NG3Fto2F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1103 0 0}It won't do any good to head back! We don't know what's going on down there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_AreaChange_Common
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1093 0 0}I know you want to go see what's happening... but I'm not joking about how dangerous it is down there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ShakeAlert_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}H-Hurry! We have to go higher![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ShakeAlert_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}Hurry, we need to hurry up...![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_ShakeAlert_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1028 0 0}Please, let's just hurry upstairs, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_TV_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}That's not going to turn on... Please, let's hurry away from here, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_BackDoor_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Not that way! Umm... It's dangerous outside![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_Freezer_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}You can do that later! We need to get away, fast![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_Board_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1077 0 0}This isn't an evacuation drill! It won't be written on the schedule.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_CommonPC_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}There's no power going to that right now... You can check it out another time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_BookShelf01_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Please, you can read any other time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_BookShelf02_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}Now's not the time to be reading![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_BookShelf03_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1092 0 0}It's dangerous to be near the shelves... They might topple onto you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_StoreRoom_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Things might fall over, so let's not stand here, okay?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_PostBox_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1006 0 0}C'mon... Now's not the time for letters.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_ToiletMen_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Uh, well... Um... Can you hold it in for now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_ToiletWomen_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 70 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1007 0 0}What's wrong? We need to hurry and run![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_1F_Goto2F_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1089 0 0}All right, let's get away upstairs.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Door_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should get back to where Yukari is...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Closet_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's no need to change right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Calendar_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I wonder if I'll make it to[n]tomorrow in one piece...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Bed_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I'm completely awake now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_TV_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The TV isn't turning on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Desk_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The desk is straightened...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Heater_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It's a bit chilly...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Mirror_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I see a tired face in the reflection...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_Myroom_Freezer_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The fridge's power is out...[n]{f 1 1}
